zh.heading: 閱讀
zh.sourceNote:
閱讀讓我更加貼近自己，也是我撥開內在未知謎霧的途徑。 
 本書單同步自我的 Notion。
zh.emptyFinished: 還沒有標記已完成的書。
zh.emptyContent: 貽丞還沒寫這本書的心得，如你所知，他有點懶惰。

en.heading: Reading
en.sourceNote:
Reading brings me closer to myself, and it is one of the ways I find my way through the unknown fog within.  
 Synced from my Notion book list.
en.emptyContent: Yi-Cheng hasn't written his thoughts on this book yet. As you might already know about him, he's a bit lazy.
